lomka.config.title: Lomka Configuration
lomka.config.culling.frustum_cull_all.to: Apply frustum culling to all entities
lomka.config.culling.block_entity_cullin: Apply occlusion and frustum culling to block entities
lomka.config.culling.smart_leaves_cullin: Cull faces between adjacent leaf blocks to reduce geometry
lomka.config.entities.client_tick_cull.t: Throttle ticking of distant decoration entities (item frames, paintings)
lomka.config.entities.client_tick_cull_i: Also throttle Display entities (text displays, item displays)
lomka.config.chunks.silence_ignore_out_o: Suppress 'Ignoring chunk since it's not in the view range' warnings
lomka.config.render.opengl_debug_disable: Disable OpenGL debug output for better performance
lomka.config.render.translucency_resort_: Throttle translucency resorting for better performance
lomka.config.java.java25_optimizations.t: Enable Java 25 optimizations: ScopedValue, compact object headers (-XX:+UseCompactObjectHeaders), AOT cache hints. Requires Java 25+.
